mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation ( user_id, menu_id, status, reserved_at, deposit_amount, people_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{menuId}, 'RESERVED', #{reservedAt}, #{depositAmount}, #{peopleCount} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = 'AVAILABLE', canceled_at = #{canceledAt}, user_id = NULL WHERE reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE status = 'AVAILABLE' ORDER BY reserved_at ASC
